content: Planning stack hierarchy: UI Solidification is the parent roadmap goal containing all milestone placeholders as steps. Active milestones (A.3, A.5, A.6) get pushed as child goals linked to their parent step via planStepId. When child completes, parent resumes. This preserves context across sessions. As of 2026-03-01: A.3/A.5 done, A.6 active (15 issues), Evidence Epic #205 and A.4 still open.
